texts: Reworked the design and layout of the Identities and E.G.Os individual pages. Skills have also been slightly redesigned.
Changed Ratings/Reviews behavior to ignore ratings that are all 0s. You can still submit reviews with all 0 ratings if you don't want to affect the actual rating.
Fixed an issue where clicking on a link while creating or editing a review in the modal in the Community Rankings page would bypass the warning for leaving with an unsaved review.
Fixed an issue where clicking go back on an md plan can lead to a 404 page.
